expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: final quality pass preserves layering and executable wording
expectations.evidence: The output explicitly calls out the case focus and attempts to assess it, but notes missing artifacts: "Case focus to verify: final quality pass preserves layering and executable wording" and "Result is BLOCKED due to missing Phase 6 output artifacts required to evaluate layering preservation and executable wording for the final polish pass."

expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Output aligns with primary phase phase6
expectations.evidence: The result is structured around Phase 6 contract requirements and required Phase 6 outputs: "Primary phase under test: Phase 6"; "What Phase 6 must demonstrate (contract)"; lists required outputs "drafts/qa_plan_phase6_r<round>.md" and "context/quality_delta_<feature-id>.md" and phase6 rubric elements (layering requirement, coverage preservation, quality_delta required sections).
